reference: Hello. A chocolate cyst can sometimes rupture, leading to life-threatening peritonitis; therefore, surgical removal is the best option. The surgery involves the removal of the affected ovaries only, and as a result, you will not have any reproductive problems. All the best.
text: Hello, a chocolate cyst can sometimes rupture leading to life-threatening peritonitis. Therefore, surgical removal is the best option. The surgery involves the removal of the affected ovaries only, and as a result, you will not have any reproductive problems. All the best.
